Abashayeli banesibopho sokwazi imibandela yabo yelayisensi.

Uma ungaqiniseki ngomthetho, inketho ephephile ukungashayeli kuze kube yilapho kucacisiwe.

Ukuthobela imithetho kuvikela kokubili ukuphepha kanye nesimo selayisensi.

category: Imithetho Yokunikeza Amalayisense, Yomfundi kanye Nemithetho Ye-P-Plate (i-NSW)
description:
Izinhlelo zokunikeza amalayisense eziphothuliwe zikhona ukuze kuncishiswe izingozi ezinkulu.

Ukungabi nolwazi kuhlangene nokuzethemba ngokweqile kuyisici esikhulu sengozi.

Izindlela ezinqamulelayo kanye nokwephulwa kwemithetho emincane kungaba nemiphumela emibi.

Ukuqhubeka okuphephile kudinga isineke kanye nokuthobela imithetho.

Ukulandela imibandela yelayisensi nokuthola ulwazi kancane kancane kuholela ekushayeleni okuphephile.
